title: Scarecrows+
description: vanilla-friendly scarecrow model by renaming a carved pumpkin
body:
# **Scarecrows+**

### **ABOUT**
Simple, vanilla-style scarecrow model to decorate your farms. Just rename a carved pumpkin to "Scarecrow" to turn the pumpkin into a scarecrow then put it on an item frame.

### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.21.7-1.21.11\
64x

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
